{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source<br>Categories}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Bharata Scripture
|class_id=20761
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=
|description=The Bharata Scripture is profound, to gain power from it, Earth's will awards travelers with a customized Sanskrit scripture to accelerate research and eliminate the Demon God's forces as soon as possible! -- Earth's Will (Seal)
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=30
|civ=18
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Bharata Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +3<br>Per Bharata Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Bharata Apostles defeated:10/10 
|ss2=Per Bharata Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +6<br>Per Bharata Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +6<br>Bharata Apostles defeated:10/10 
|ss3=Per Bharata Apostle defeated, Snail DEF +9<br>Per Bharata Apostle defeated, Snail RUSH +9<br>Bharata Apostles defeated:10/10 
}}
